description_long: This is a robust wooden storage box with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring visible wood grain and diagonal reinforcement planks on its sides. The box is constructed from several wooden panels, each bordered and reinforced with additional wooden strips for structural integrity. One side of the box is fitted with a metal mesh panel, suggesting ventilation or partial visibility of the contents inside, which is uncommon for standard crates. The wood is aged and slightly faded, giving it a utilitarian look suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The box appears large enough to store medium to large items and is likely intended for use on the ground or in storage areas such as garages or warehouses.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with diagonal reinforcements and a metal mesh panel on one side, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look. Ideal for urban storage in garages or outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wooden panel with diagonal reinforcement and no mesh.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar wooden panel and diagonal plank, matching the front but with slightly different wood grain.
description_view_2: Another wooden side with diagonal reinforcement, similar to the previous views but with unique wood texture.
description_view_3: Back view features a prominent metal mesh panel framed by wood, distinguishing it from the other sides.
